text: The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.

Validation between Blazor WASM and ASP.NET Core 11 from one Shared library. DataAnnotations on the DTO runs in both; FluentValidation 12 covers conditional and async-only rules via RuleSets. The trick: map ValidationProblemDetails into the same EditContext the client used, so 'username taken' lands on the right field.
